title: Near and Far (SCRAPPED)
description:
A dimension mod inspired by mushrooms and insects

This mod has been scrapped and will no longer receive any new updates.
body:
A dimension mod that adds two new dimensions: the Nearlands and the Barrens (as of yet, only the Nearlands have been implemented).

Currently still in alpha, some textures and features may be missing. This is only published to easily share the mod with playtesters.

Requires Terrablender

Mod details:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
To enter the Nearlands, craft a divine altar from a moonstone, stone bricks, and orange mushrooms (recipe and moonstone not yet implemented)
Moonstones can be found in asteroids found across the Overworld (not yet implemented)
Orange mushrooms can be crafted from orange fungi blocks from large orange mushrooms.

The Nearlands is home to the sporelings, moth-like creatures in a symbiotic relationship with fungi. They can be bred with orange mushrooms (not yet implemented). Large orange mushrooms, darkwood trees, and orange cherry trees can be found in the Nearlands as well. Three biomes have been added: the fungal fields, the suptropical forest, and the orange cherry grove.


</details>
